LanguageData.LOSDesignator_PlanWall_Desc: Place hypothetical walls that block LOS.\nDrag to place lines or rectangles.
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_PlanCover_Desc: Place hypothetical cover (sandbag-equivalent).\nDrag to place lines or rectangles.
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_PlanOpen_Desc: Mark a cell as open space for LOS calculations.\nDrag to place lines or rectangles.
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_PlaceObserver_Desc: Place an observer point. Select it to view LOS overlay.
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_RemoveLOSPlanning_Desc: Click or drag to remove LOS planning markers.
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_ClearAllPlanning_Desc: Remove ALL LOS planning markers from the map.
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_CombinedView_Desc: Show combined STATIC LOS from ALL observer markers (outgoing fire only).\nCover shown is the minimum (most exposed angle).
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_TogglePlanningVisibility_D: Show or hide all LOS planning markers without deleting them.\nUseful for checking what the map looks like now while keeping your plans for later.
LanguageData.LOSDesignator_ToggleCoverMap_Desc: Toggle a persistent overlay showing the terrain cover value of each cell.
LanguageData.LOSPlanningMarker_InspectString: LOS Observer - select to view overlay\nLeft-click the LOS gizmo to cycle mode. Right-click for offensive/defensive view.
LanguageData.LOSGizmo_ModeDesc_Off: LOS overlay off. Left-click to enable static mode.\nRight-click to change view direction.
LanguageData.LOSGizmo_ModeDesc_Static_CanLean: Static LOS from this position.\nGreen = clear, Yellow = partial cover, Red = heavy cover.\nLeft-click for leaning mode. Right-click for view direction.
LanguageData.LOSGizmo_ModeDesc_Static_CannotLean: Static LOS from this position.\nGreen = clear, Yellow = partial cover, Red = heavy cover.\nLeft-click to turn off. Right-click for view direction.
LanguageData.LOSGizmo_ModeDesc_Leaning: LOS including lean-around-corner positions.\nGreen = clear, Yellow = partial cover, Red = heavy cover.\nLeft-click to turn off. Right-click for view direction.
LanguageData.LOSGizmo_RightClick_Defensive: Defensive (cover YOU have from each threat)
LanguageData.LOSSettings_HideCoverMapButton_Tooltip: Hide the cover map toggle button from the overlay controls.
LanguageData.LOSSettings_ColorBands_CE: Cover color bands (CE — height in meters)
